response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals and mentoring capabilities, there is a critical technical mismatch. The role requires 8–12 years of C++ expertise with demonstrated experience in industrial automation, cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443), and networked systems; the candidate has only 6 months of C++ experience (2014–2015) and a 10+ year career almost entirely in web/mobile technologies (TypeScript, Node.js, React). The absence of C++ depth, industrial automation background, and security compliance expertise makes this a poor fit.
strengths: Deep software engineering discipline with strong focus on testing, TDD, and code quality across two decades of experience
Proven React and Node.js expertise, matching key advantageous skills mentioned in the job description
Demonstrated ability to architect systems and mentor on coding standards, as evidenced by organizing refactoring dojos and creating technical courses
concerns: Only 6 months of C++ professional experience (2014–2015), vastly insufficient for a role requiring 8–12 years of demonstrated C++ expertise
Career focused almost entirely on web/mobile/data technologies; no experience with industrial automation, IoT, embedded systems, or networked systems at required complexity level
No evidence of experience with IEC 62443 standards, Secure Development Lifecycle, industrial protocols (Modbus, IEC 61850, OPC UA), or cybersecurity practices

key_factors.factor: Wrong domain background (web/mobile vs. industrial automation)
Strong general software engineering discipline and mentoring ability
